alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds contaning a phenoxy group.
alternative_parents.name: Phenoxy compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl aryl ether functional group with the generic formula R-O-R' , where R is an alkyl group and R' is an aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl aryl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing positively charged polyatomic ion of the structure NR4+, R being an alkyl group or an aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Quaternary ammonium salts

alternative_parents.description: Organonitrogen compounds with the general formula RN=CN(R')(R''), (R,R',R'' = H or organyl group).
alternative_parents.name: Carboximidamides

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acid derivatives containing the amidine group.
alternative_parents.name: Carboxamidines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a chlorine ion.
alternative_parents.name: Organic chloride salts

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with a positive electric charge.
alternative_parents.name: Organic cations

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing an ether group substituted with a benzene ring.
class.name: Phenol ethers

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as phenol ethers. These are aromatic compounds containing an ether group substituted with a benzene ring.

direct_parent.description: Aromatic compounds containing an ether group substituted with a benzene ring.
direct_parent.name: Phenol ethers

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
